biography: Riku, recognized as the brother of fellow competitor Panu, marked his unique contribution to the Hector Trophée with a single, memorable appearance. While details regarding his home club remain unconfirmed, his participation, however brief, established his place within the tournament's growing legacy. His presence, though confined to a solitary year, nonetheless enriched the competitive field during his time.

During his one foray into the challenging formats of the Hector Trophée, Riku engaged fully with the demands of the competition. Though he did not secure a victory in the team event for the coveted Hector Trophée, nor did he claim the individual Victor Trophy, his entry into the annals of the tournament is duly recorded. As the Hector Trophée 2026 approaches, Riku is now considered to have concluded his competitive journey within this particular event, though his link to the tournament through his brother remains a distinctive aspect of its familial lore.
